od_description: Nowshera ↔ Ellahibagh via Lal Bazar (NE Srinagar). A short local corridor in the same NE cluster as C2.
matched_permit: Parimpora to Harwan via Brein Nishat
stops_verdict: Strong stops along the Nowshera–Lal Bazar–Ellahibagh line; genuine local boarding points.
narrative: Another NE-Srinagar local corridor (Nowshera ↔ Ellahibagh via Lal Bazar), corroborating C2. All candidate permits are Parimpora/Hazratbal routes with ≤0.40 overlap — none cleanly covers this O–D. Best partial is SSCL-01 (shares the Lal Bazar–Nishat arm). 32 runs / 7 drivers. Part of a cluster (C2, C9) of busy NE-Srinagar local circulation that the formal permit network covers poorly.

all permit overlaps ≤0.40 — no clean match; best SSCL-01 partial

analyst_note: NE-Srinagar under-permitted local cluster (C2 + C9): Nowshera / Lal Bazar / Ellahibagh / Soura area — worth a formal feeder route.
correction_raw_permit_check: RAW-PERMIT CHECK (2026-07-02): the places on this corridor ARE in the raw permit system (e.g. Lalbazar 26 / Soura 83 / Gulabagh 2 / Budgam 42 / Pampore 40 permit endpoints; smaller mahallas are traversed, named for major endpoints). Retracting any 'under-permitted/informal' reading — the ≤0.40 overlap is with the engine's RATIONALISED geometry, so this is a DIVERGENCE between the rationalised route geometry and observed reality (engine to reconcile), NOT an informal route.
